description: Near-miss probe (issue #183, docs/evaluation.md D1 near-miss set): counterparty names a 'designated official' rather than using the literal trigger phrase 'school official' for 'no-ferpa-school-official'. Must ACCEPT with zero fires.

must_not_flag.reason: 'designated official' is a distinct phrase from the trigger_term 'school official'; must not fire.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Institution shall designate a specific designated official responsible for FERPA compliance who is not authorized to redisclose education records for any third-party purpose.
planted_variation.notes: Near-miss: 'designated official' never forms the consecutive two-word phrase 'school official'.

detector_expectation.rationale: Hunk does not contain the trigger_term 'school official' as a consecutive phrase.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
